treatment_information.dosage_or_details: Cycle 2 of DA-EPOCH; Filgrastim 300 mcg SC Q24H planned for 10 days
treatment_information.treatment_response: Patient has been feeling well; nausea improved several days after discharge and tolerating solid foods without difficulty.

treatment_timeline.event: Patient admitted for cycle 2 of DA-EPOCH chemotherapy.
Discharge after ongoing monitoring with noted improvement in nausea and tolerance of foods.
Patient to continue Neupogen injections at home.

patient_outcome.final_status: patient discharged home in stable condition.
patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Follow-up appointments scheduled but specifics not provided.
patient_outcome.long_term_prognosis: Patient needs to take new antibiotics to prevent infections until CD4 count recovers.
patient_outcome.quality_of_life: Patient is alert, interactive, and ambulatory independent.
patient_outcome.patient_perspective: Overall good condition and feeling well post-treatment, with instructions for ongoing care.
